segments.caption: The video opens with sweeping aerial views of Shanghai’s iconic skyline, showcasing landmarks like the Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai Tower, and the Shanghai World Financial Center, with the Huangpu River winding through the city. The scene transitions to a woman in a brown tank top and patterned skirt dancing joyfully on a sunlit sidewalk, followed by a panoramic shot of the city with the word 'SHANGHAI' superimposed. A man in a pink shirt appears on the Bund, gesturing enthusiastically toward the skyline, with on-screen text indicating 'Population: 26.3 million'. The video then shifts to a 3D animated globe zooming into China, highlighting Shanghai’s location on the East China Sea, with the Yangtze and Huangpu Rivers labeled. The map compares Shanghai’s size (6,341 km²) to Moscow and London. The narrative continues with a woman walking on a rooftop helipad overlooking the city, with a GDP figure of '$670 billion' displayed. This is followed by a massive port filled with shipping containers and cranes, emphasizing Shanghai’s economic power. The scene cuts to a man in a white shirt eating a pineapple-shaped dish with chopsticks, then to three smiling women walking together on a tree-lined street. The final shot shows a bustling airport terminal with travelers and a prominent 'Shanghai' sign, indicating arrival or departure.

segments.caption: The video begins with a dynamic view of the Shanghai Maglev Train at a modern station, showcasing its sleek white and teal design as it arrives and departs. Passengers are seen boarding and disembarking, with on-screen text indicating the train’s price ($7.00) and speed (431 km/h or 268 mph). The interior of the train is shown with bright turquoise seats and passengers seated calmly, while the view outside the window reveals a rapid journey over green fields, highways, and urban infrastructure. The scene transitions to an aerial night view of The Bund, illuminated with golden lights along the Huangpu River, crowded with people enjoying the vibrant atmosphere. The next sequence shifts to a daytime view of the Shanghai skyline, with the Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai Tower, and Shanghai World Financial Center prominently visible behind red-and-white barriers. A man in a pink shirt walks toward the camera, gesturing toward the skyline. The video then cuts to a large bronze bull statue in front of classical architecture, where the same man in the pink shirt playfully interacts with the statue, mimicking its pose. The scene transitions again to a bustling street at dusk, with illuminated colonial-style buildings and traffic, followed by a shot of the Peace Hotel entrance, where pedestrians walk past under its iconic green awning and golden signage. The final frames show a lively street scene with people crossing the road and walking near the hotel, capturing the city’s energetic urban rhythm.

segments.caption: The video begins with a daytime panoramic view of the Peace Hotel, a grand building with a distinctive green awning and golden signage reading 'PEACE HOTEL' and '和平饭店', set against a backdrop of other historic structures along the Bund. The scene transitions to the HSBC Building, a massive neoclassical structure with a central dome and columns, where a man in a pink shirt and light-colored pants walks across the frame, gesturing toward the camera. The camera then pans to The Custom House, a clock-towered building from 1927, partially obscured by trees. The setting shifts to nighttime, showcasing the illuminated Bund with its ornate colonial-style buildings glowing under streetlights, as pedestrians stroll along the promenade. The camera captures a wide view of the Bund at night, with the Huangpu River reflecting the lights of the buildings. The scene transitions back to daytime, showing a busy street with a red double-decker bus and a pedestrian overpass, followed by a shot of a red-and-white building with arched windows, overlaid with text about the First Opium War (1839–1842). The next frame shows a similar building with text about the Second Opium War (1856–1860), followed by a view of the ICBC building, a white neoclassical structure with columns and Chinese characters reading '中国工商银行'. The final shot shows a street lined with classical architecture, including the ICBC building, with cars and pedestrians moving along the road.

segments.caption: The video opens with a sweeping aerial view of the Shanghai skyline, showcasing the dense cluster of modern skyscrapers flanking the Huangpu River, with the Pudong and Puxi districts labeled in stylized text. The scene transitions to a dynamic shot of the Nanpu Bridge, a curved cable-stayed structure bustling with traffic, as vehicles move along its multi-lane roadway. The perspective shifts to a ground-level view from a moving vehicle, capturing the illuminated skyline at dusk, including the iconic Oriental Pearl Tower. The journey continues through a futuristic, blue-lit tunnel, likely part of the Shanghai Maglev Train system, with a price tag of $7.00 displayed. The video then returns to aerial shots of the Lujiazui financial district, highlighting its towering architecture and riverfront position. Ground-level scenes follow, showing pedestrians crossing busy intersections under bright sunlight, with some holding umbrellas for shade, while modern skyscrapers loom in the background. The camera pans across a roundabout adorned with colorful landscaping and a large decorative sculpture, surrounded by heavy traffic and elevated roadways. The sequence captures the vibrant, fast-paced urban life of Shanghai, blending architectural grandeur with daily human activity.

segments.caption: The video opens with a low-angle shot of the HSBC Building, where the Man in pink shirt walks across the frame, gesturing toward the camera. The scene transitions to a white SUV parked outside a DAMIANI store, with a woman in a brown tank top exiting the vehicle. The narrative then shifts to a sweeping aerial view of the Shanghai skyline, showcasing the iconic Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai World Financial Center, and Shanghai Tower, with the Huangpu River winding through the city. Text overlays identify the Jin Mao Tower (420m), World Financial Centre (492m), and Shanghai Tower (632m), emphasizing their heights. The camera pans across the skyline, offering panoramic views from the observation decks of the skyscrapers, including a close-up of the Shanghai Tower’s helipad and a glass-enclosed skywalk. The sequence concludes with expansive aerial shots of the city, highlighting the dense urban landscape, the river, and the surrounding areas, capturing the grandeur and scale of Shanghai’s modern architecture.

segments.caption: The video begins inside a high-speed elevator at the Shanghai Tower, where a digital display shows the elevator ascending at 10.0 m/s, with the floor count decreasing from 99 to 96, and the building's height marked as 460m. The scene transitions to an outdoor urban plaza where a man in a white polo shirt is seen holding a drone and its remote controller, preparing for flight. He is joined by a woman in a patterned top and another man in a black t-shirt, who interact with him as he gestures and speaks. The drone is then shown being assembled on a black case, with close-ups of its propellers and camera. The video cuts to a breathtaking aerial view of the Shanghai skyline, showcasing the Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai Tower, and Shanghai World Financial Center, with the Huangpu River flowing below. The scene shifts to the interior of the Lujiazui Metro Station, where passengers pass through turnstiles and walk through a modern, brightly lit concourse. The camera moves through the station, capturing signage for Line 2 and Line 14, and a large digital screen displaying an animated character. The video then shows the interior of a metro train, with passengers seated and standing, some using their phones. The final scenes depict the station’s commercial area, including a MINISO store, a BIRDIE CUP COFFEE shop with a minimalist design, and a man in a pink shirt walking past, all under bright, clean lighting.

segments.caption: The video begins with a view of a modern subway platform, where passengers wait behind glass barriers as a train arrives. The platform features digital signage displaying train schedules and route maps, including Line 4 and Line 14, with clear Chinese text indicating destinations like '徐泾东' (Xujingdong) and '陆家嘴' (Lujiazui). The camera pans to show a large screen with a Q&A about children's ticketing, followed by a close-up of a red Shanghai public transportation card being tapped at a turnstile. The scene transitions to the interior of a crowded subway car, where passengers are seated or standing, many engrossed in their phones. The camera then shows a detailed map of the Shanghai Metro system, highlighting multiple lines and stations, including Lujiazui and People's Square. The video shifts to an outdoor scene where a man in a beige t-shirt and glasses is smiling while using a yellow public payphone. He is later seen walking with another man in a black t-shirt, both engaged in conversation, passing by a Nike store with a large glass facade. The final shot captures a vibrant red sculpture of a basketball player mid-dunk inside a modern shopping mall, with escalators and shoppers visible in the background.

segments.caption: The video opens with a bustling street scene in Shanghai’s Former French Concession, marked by a text overlay identifying the area. Pedestrians, including a man in a striped shirt and a woman in a black dress, cross a zebra crossing under the shade of large, leafy trees. The camera pans along tree-lined streets, capturing vintage-style buildings with arched windows and balconies, some adorned with laundry and red lanterns. A blue bus labeled '24路' (Route 24) passes by, followed by a red car and a green taxi. The scene transitions to a wider view of a grand, curved brick building identified by text as 'WUKANG MANSION, 1924'. A man in a beige t-shirt and glasses appears, gesturing toward the building while speaking to the camera. The camera zooms in on the mansion’s ornate balconies with flower boxes, then pulls back to show the full structure at a busy intersection with traffic and pedestrians. The final frames show a group of people on scooters waiting at a crosswalk, with one person holding a phone, as vehicles pass by under a clear sky.

active_entities.Man in beige t-shirt: A man wearing a beige t-shirt and glasses, standing in front of the Wukang Mansion, gesturing toward the building while speaking to the camera.

segments.caption: The video begins with an exterior shot of a pale yellow, multi-story building in a quiet, tree-lined neighborhood, where a woman is seen hanging laundry on a balcony. The scene transitions to the entrance of a restaurant named 'Rose Shanghai Restaurant,' marked by a sign above the door and a decorative chandelier hanging inside. The camera moves inside, revealing a warmly lit dining area with classic decor, including framed portraits of historical figures on the walls and a checkered floor. A group of diners is seated at a round table, enjoying a meal together. The camera then focuses on various dishes being served: plum pork ribs garnished with green pickles and almonds, shredded jellyfish with green onions, shredded lobster buns in chicken sauce, presidential beef with a glossy glaze and green peas, and a rich crab and shrimp meal. Each dish is presented on a white plate, with on-screen text displaying the dish name in both Chinese and English, along with the price. The atmosphere is cozy and elegant, with red curtains, wooden paneling, and soft lighting enhancing the dining experience.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a vibrant, orange-hued dish of stir-fried corn and vegetables on a white plate, accompanied by a spoon, set on a dining table with other dishes including a whole fish in a rich red sauce garnished with green peas and pine nuts. The dish is identified by an on-screen text overlay as 'Squirrel mandarin fish' priced at $36.20. A hand uses chopsticks to interact with the fish, lifting a piece to reveal its flaky texture. The camera then shifts to a man in a beige t-shirt and glasses seated at the table, speaking animatedly while gesturing toward the food. The setting is a warmly lit restaurant with red curtains, wooden paneling, and checkered flooring, creating an elegant ambiance. The scene transitions to the exterior of the restaurant, showing a classic European-style facade with potted plants and a red umbrella, before cutting to a busy city street with cars, including a bright blue sports car and a yellow taxi, and pedestrians crossing a zebra crossing. The final shot shows two men walking side by side on a tree-lined sidewalk; one wears a black t-shirt with an 'ACG' logo, and the other is the man in the beige t-shirt. Subtitles appear, reading 'if you Shanghai, you will not accept you, finding a partner,' suggesting a conversation about social integration or relationships in the city.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with two men, the Man in black t-shirt and the Man in beige t-shirt, walking and conversing on a tree-lined sidewalk in a bustling urban area. The Man in black t-shirt wears a black t-shirt with an orange 'ACG' logo, while the Man in beige t-shirt wears a beige t-shirt and glasses, both appearing engaged in a casual discussion about life and career. The camera then cuts to a woman in a black dress and white mask walking past a brick building with a sign 'FX8', followed by a quick shot of a group of people crossing a busy street at a zebra crossing, including a woman with blonde hair and a man in a red shirt. The scene returns to the two men, who continue their conversation, with the Man in beige t-shirt smiling and gesturing. The video then shifts to three young women, identified as the Three women walking, standing together on the sidewalk. They are dressed stylishly: one in a black sleeveless top with a white skirt, one in a brown tank top with white gloves, and one in a blue tie-dye dress. They respond to questions from the camera, revealing they are students majoring in dance and expressing their appreciation for Shanghai’s relaxed environment. The women smile and laugh as they interact, with one playfully gesturing when asked to perform a dance move. The background features a sunny, leafy street with parked scooters, modern buildings, and a mix of pedestrians, creating a vibrant, youthful atmosphere.

active_entities.Man in black t-shirt: A man wearing a black t-shirt with an orange 'ACG' logo, walking alongside the Man in beige t-shirt on a tree-lined sidewalk, engaged in conversation.
active_entities.Man in beige t-shirt: A man wearing a beige t-shirt and glasses, walking and talking with the Man in black t-shirt, smiling and gesturing during their conversation.
active_entities.Three women walking: Three young women standing together on a sunny sidewalk; one in a black sleeveless top with a white skirt, one in a brown tank top with white gloves, and one in a blue tie-dye dress, smiling and interacting with the camera.

discovered_new_entities.Woman in black dress: A woman wearing a black dress and a white face mask, walking past a brick building with a sign 'FX8' on a tree-lined street.

discovered_new_entities.Man in red shirt: A man wearing a red shirt with white stripes on the sleeves, seen from behind as he walks across a street with a group of people.

segments.caption: The video opens with a woman in a gray crop top and olive green cargo pants joyfully dancing on a tree-lined sidewalk in a sunny urban neighborhood, her movements energetic and expressive as she twirls and gestures. The scene transitions to a bustling street corner where a group of people, including a woman in a white top and a man in a black t-shirt, are seen walking past storefronts like 'STELLAR ESSENCE' and 'D DESIRABLE'. The camera then moves inside a modern, minimalist coffee shop named 'Into the Force', where patrons are seated at wooden tables, some using their phones while others enjoy drinks. The interior features a unique design with stacked wooden blocks on the walls and a casual, communal atmosphere. A menu board is shown, advertising a 'Summer Limited COMBO' with 'EDIBLE CUP™' coffee for ¥50, featuring a 'Crisp & Natural' oat-based cup. The focus shifts to two edible cups filled with coffee—one with a dark, marbled latte and the other with a light, green-hued drink—placed on a branded cardboard tray. A man in a beige t-shirt and glasses takes a bite of the brown edible cup, followed by another man in a black t-shirt who bites into the green cup, both appearing amused and intrigued by the experience. The setting is bright and lively, with natural light streaming in and a mix of casual diners enjoying the innovative coffee experience.

active_entities.Man in beige t-shirt: A man wearing a beige t-shirt and glasses, seated at a table in the coffee shop, taking a bite of a brown edible coffee cup with a surprised and amused expression.
active_entities.Man in black t-shirt: A man wearing a black t-shirt, seated at a table in the coffee shop, biting into a green edible coffee cup and showing a playful, intrigued reaction.
active_entities.Woman in white top: A woman wearing a white top, seen walking past the coffee shop entrance with a group, carrying a bag and smiling as she moves along the sidewalk.

segments.caption: The video opens with a man in a black t-shirt and blue jeans standing beside a row of teal-colored shared bicycles, scanning a QR code on one with his smartphone. He successfully unlocks the bike via a mobile app, which displays a map and a 'Start Riding' button. The scene transitions to a first-person perspective as he begins riding the bike down a tree-lined street in the Former French Concession, shaded by large, mature trees with dappled sunlight filtering through. The street is quiet and picturesque, with vintage European-style buildings, including a café named 'RUMORS COFFEE ROASTERS' and a yellow taxi passing by. Other cyclists and pedestrians are visible, including a woman in a black dress and a man in a striped shirt. The man rides past a row of parked shared bikes in various colors (yellow, blue, red) and a black sports car parked near a crosswalk. He glances back at the camera with a smile, then continues riding, passing a woman in a white dress and a man in a beige t-shirt. The camera captures the serene, leafy environment, with a speed limit sign indicating '30' and a blue street sign reading '泰安路' (Taian Road). The segment ends with a wide shot of the street, showing the man riding away, surrounded by greenery and historic architecture, emphasizing the charm and tranquility of the neighborhood.
